---
title: "scRNA Annotation Review Report: decoupler"
date: today
jupyter: python3
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 3
    toc-expand: 3
    toc-location: left
    html-math-method: katex
    code-fold: true
    code-tools: true
    embed-resources: true
    page-layout: full
    html-table-processing: none
    theme: lumen
    fig-width: 10
    fig-height: 5
execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
  message: false
---

```{python}
from pathlib import Path
import sys

import pandas as pd

LIB_DIR = Path(".").resolve() / "lib"
if str(LIB_DIR) not in sys.path:
    sys.path.insert(0, str(LIB_DIR))

from report_utils import format_table, load_report_context, package_versions_table

ROOT = Path(".").resolve()
context = load_report_context(ROOT)
```

## Status

This report file is reserved for a future Python-native `decoupler` review
layer. Unlike classifier backends, `decoupler` is intended here as a
marker/pathway validation layer rather than a standalone final annotation
engine.

```{python}
status_df = pd.DataFrame(
    [
        {"field": "method", "value": "decoupler_review"},
        {"field": "implemented_in_runtime", "value": "no"},
        {"field": "intended_role", "value": "marker and pathway-based annotation review"},
        {"field": "current_selected_methods", "value": ", ".join(context["selected_methods"])},
    ]
)
format_table(status_df)
```

## Planned Review Outputs

```{python}
planned_df = pd.DataFrame(
    [
        {"output": "gene-set scores by cluster", "purpose": "compare candidate labels with known signatures"},
        {"output": "marker agreement summary", "purpose": "confirm or challenge classifier suggestions"},
        {"output": "pathway activity snapshot", "purpose": "add functional context to ambiguous clusters"},
        {"output": "disagreement table", "purpose": "highlight clusters needing manual review"},
    ]
)
format_table(planned_df)
```

## Planned Config Inputs

```{python}
config_df = pd.DataFrame(
    [
        {"key": "marker_review.marker_file", "meaning": "user-supplied marker set YAML"},
        {"key": "review resource", "meaning": "optional prior-knowledge resource or signature collection"},
        {"key": "cluster_key", "meaning": "grouping level for cluster summaries"},
    ]
)
format_table(config_df)
```

## Session Info

```{python}
session_df = package_versions_table(["scanpy", "anndata", "pandas", "numpy", "plotly", "decoupler"])
format_table(session_df)
```
